summary_one_line: IHDR color_type byte at offset 0x19 must equal 0x03 (PNG_COLOR_TYPE_PALETTE) to take the true side.

hypotheses.what_input_feature: The IHDR color_type byte at input offset 0x19 (buf[9], the 10th byte of the 13-byte IHDR payload) must hold value 0x03 = PNG_COLOR_TYPE_PALETTE; the switch on png_ptr->color_type then takes the line 883 case body.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: Every cmplog winning seed carries 0x03 at offset 0x19, and the BYTE DIFF column shows the winner set is concentrated entirely on 03 there (03(.)x30), while DIVERGENT BRANCHES shows line 883 firing W T=30 F=0.
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: naive loser seeds hold 00/04/06 at offset 0x19 (GRAY_with_other, RGB, RGBA paths), never the exact 0x03 PALETTE value, so line 883's true side is never taken (L T=0 F=10).
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: cmplog's I2SRandReplace reads the CmpLogObserver buffer recording the switch comparison color_type vs the case constant 3, finds the loser's color_type byte in the input, and substitutes the constant 3 at offset 0x19 — directly solving the equality the loser cannot reach by blind havoc.

hypotheses.what_input_feature: The same single byte at offset 0x19 (color_type) must reach 0x03; the switch comparison color_type==PNG_COLOR_TYPE_PALETTE is the gate.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: value_profile resolves the branch in 10/10 trials and the winner-resolving byte set is concentrated on 03 at offset 0x19, satisfying the case-3 comparison.
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: naive holds non-3 color_type values (00/04/06) and blocks 9/10 trials; without comparison feedback it cannot home in on the exact constant 3.
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: value_profile's CMP_MAP records the operand-distance bucket between color_type and the case constant 3; an input whose color_type byte is Hamming-closer to 3 than any prior input is preserved as corpus, giving a gradient toward 0x03 that naive's bare edge feedback lacks.

hypotheses.what_input_feature: The same color_type byte at offset 0x19 must equal 0x03 to enter the line 883 case body; no new comparison structure, just the same equality.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: naive_ctx resolves 10/10 trials and its winner-resolving seeds (the displayed naive_ctx seeds) all carry 0x03 at offset 0x19.
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: naive blocks 9/10 with non-3 color_type bytes; the same havoc mutator stack as naive_ctx but flat edge indexing leaves it stuck.
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: naive_ctx uses naive's identical havoc/token mutators (no I2S, no CMP_MAP), but the CtxHook folds call-context into the edge map so reaching line 883 via a new caller chain registers as new coverage; this richer corpus-retention keeps more IHDR-shaped intermediates alive, raising the odds a havoc mutation lands 0x03 at offset 0x19.

evidence_trail.claim: The blocker is the PNG_COLOR_TYPE_PALETTE case of the switch on png_ptr->color_type, true side globally blocked.
color_type is read from buf[9], which is the IHDR payload byte at input offset 0x19.
The winning inputs hold 0x03 at offset 0x19 while losers hold 00/04/06.
Line 883 fires only for the winner set; losers never take its true side.
evidence_trail.exact_quote: d=1   L 883  T=30 F=0  T=0 F=10  case PNG_COLOR_TYPE_PALETTE:

evidence_trail.claim: cmplog adds I2SRandReplace which substitutes a logged CMP operand at matching input offsets.
evidence_trail.exact_quote:
scans the input for byte sequences matching one
operand, and substitutes the other operand at those offsets

evidence_trail.claim: cmplog wins 10/10 vs naive 1/10 with prob_div 0.90 at this branch.
value_profile records a CMP_MAP distance bucket and preserves inputs closer to matching.
evidence_trail.exact_quote:
An input that produces a
CMP-operand pair closer to matching than any previously-seen pair
adds a new CMP_MAP bucket and is preserved as corpus.

evidence_trail.claim: value_profile beats naive at this branch (Pair 2).
naive_ctx uses naive's mutators with no I2S/CMP_MAP, but context-indexes the edge map so (call-context, edge) pairs count as new coverage.
evidence_trail.exact_quote:
naive's havoc + token stack. No `I2SRandReplace`, no
CMP_MAP.

evidence_trail.claim: naive_ctx beats naive at this branch (Pair 3).
naive's mutator stack contains no I2S, so it cannot directly solve the equality.
evidence_trail.exact_quote: any of the above. No I2S.

mechanism_consistency_check.verification_method: Ran `python3 tools/db_query.py lineage --branch 3951 --role W --fuzzer cmplog --trial 1 --seed 14ddd5a497528d88`; the chain has 4 levels and the I2S-floor signal reports 1 ancestor dash row (mutation_op = -) at depth 3. Against the naive loser the dash row is I2S-exclusive evidence of an I2SRandReplace find in the cmplog winner's ancestry. Note: this is the mechanism for Pair 1 only; Pairs 2/3 use CMP_MAP gradient and context-sensitive coverage respectively, which are not I2S and were not lineage-verified here.

falsifiability.would_be_refuted_by: A synthetic harness gating on color_type==3 where cmplog still blocks while naive resolves at the same rate — i.e. forcing 0x03 at offset 0x19 fails to flip the branch, showing offset 0x19 is not the controlling byte.

weakest_evidence_point: The naive_ctx win is attributed to richer corpus retention raising havoc luck rather than any comparison-solving, which is the least mechanistically direct of the three claims.
